name: controlo-estagio
description: Full-stack internship management dashboard with hour tracking and Portuguese holiday support

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
